SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.wd

Class MethodWellDefinedness

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.wd.WellDefinednessCheck
de.uka.ilkd.key.wd.MethodWellDefinedness
All Implemented Interfaces:
Contract, SpecificationElement
public final class MethodWellDefinedness extends WellDefinednessCheck
A contract for checking the well-definedness of a specification for a method or model field. Additionally to the general well-definedness contract, it consists of other definitions for the contract.

  • Nested Class Summary

    • isNormal

      public boolean isNormal(TermServices services)
      Used to determine if the contract of this method has normal behaviour or is a model field/method and can thus not throw any exception.
      Returns:
      true for either normal behaviour or model fields

    • isPure

      public boolean isPure()
      Tells whether the method is pure or not.
      Returns:
      true for pure methods and pure (model) fields

    • isModel

      public boolean isModel()
      Tells whether the method is a model method, i.e. has model behaviour or not.
      Returns:
      true for model methods
